creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: wg
Date: Wed Oct 30 15:26:19 2013
New Revision: 332129
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/332129

Log:
  devel/py-memoryprofiler: update to 0.29
  
  - Update to 0.29
  - Allow staging
  - Use options helpers
  - Python auto plist
  
  PR:		ports/183446
  Submitted by:	Johannes Jost Meixner <xmj chaot.net> (maintainer)

Modified:
  head/devel/py-memoryprofiler/Makefile
  head/devel/py-memoryprofiler/distinfo

Modified: head/devel/py-memoryprofiler/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/devel/py-memoryprofiler/Makefile	Wed Oct 30 15:25:01 2013	(r332128)
+++ head/devel/py-memoryprofiler/Makefile	Wed Oct 30 15:26:19 2013	(r332129)
@@ -2,7 +2,7 @@
 # $FreeBSD$
 
 PORTNAME=	memoryprofiler
-PORTVERSION=	0.27
+PORTVERSION=	0.29
 CATEGORIES=	devel python
 MASTER_SITES=	CHEESESHOP
 PKGNAMEPREFIX=	${PYTHON_PKGNAMEPREFIX}
@@ -15,21 +15,13 @@ LICENSE=	BSD
 
 OPTIONS_DEFINE=	PSUTIL
 PSUTIL_DESC=	Use psutil for better performance
-OPTIONSFILE?=	${PORT_DBDIR}/py-${PORTNAME}/options
+PSUTIL_RUN_DEPENDS=	${PYTHON_PKGNAMEPREFIX}-psutil>0:${PORTSDIR}/sysutils/py-psutil
 
-NO_STAGE=	yes
-.include <bsd.port.options.mk>
-.if ${PORT_OPTIONS:MPSUTIL}
-RUN_DEPENDS+=	${PYTHON_PKGNAMEPREFIX}-psutil>0:${PORTSDIR}/sysutils/py-psutil
-.endif
+OPTIONSFILE?=	${PORT_DBDIR}/py-${PORTNAME}/options
 
-USE_PYTHON=		2.6+
+USE_PYTHON=		yes
 USE_PYDISTUTILS=	yes
 PYDISTUTILS_PKGNAME=	memory_profiler
-
-PLIST_FILES+=	bin/mprofile \
-		%%PYTHON_SITELIBDIR%%/memory_profiler.py \
-		%%PYTHON_SITELIBDIR%%/memory_profiler.pyo \
-		%%PYTHON_SITELIBDIR%%/memory_profiler.pyc
+PYDISTUTILS_AUTOPLIST=	yes
 
 .include <bsd.port.mk>

Modified: head/devel/py-memoryprofiler/distinfo
==============================================================================
--- head/devel/py-memoryprofiler/distinfo	Wed Oct 30 15:25:01 2013	(r332128)
+++ head/devel/py-memoryprofiler/distinfo	Wed Oct 30 15:26:19 2013	(r332129)
@@ -1,2 +1,2 @@
-SHA256 (memory_profiler-0.27.tar.gz) = 9473c29a15456435999bfdd3a14f2d3596c997172d5b34acb6e17fe84fc9585f
-SIZE (memory_profiler-0.27.tar.gz) = 12697
+SHA256 (memory_profiler-0.29.tar.gz) = 30a6b5fdb9089ac4921db8411843bc03e13409259c2ed5e77ff5e2a6c9c9e733
+SIZE (memory_profiler-0.29.tar.gz) = 19847
